title: Platform Onboarding Notes
items: Platform onboarding doc is outdated; verify Terraform and ArgoCD steps with the latest runbook.
Request Terraform Cloud and ArgoCD in the same access thread to avoid duplicate approvals.
Join #platform-team and #deployments before your first production-readiness walkthrough.

title: Infra Security Runbook
items: Vault access depends on compliance training completion before Security will approve the ticket.
Snyk access only appears after the infra_security Jira project membership is added.
Security-runbooks space is restricted for contractors; request a redacted excerpt when needed.
